_doc: Geologist task duration model. baseDurations in seconds. timeBonus per subtype: integer for a flat speed, or {default, byTask: {'0,N': bonus}} for resource-specific subtypes (Iron-Willed boosts iron only, Stone Cold boosts stone/marble/granite, etc.). skills.reduction: percent per level. Unknown subTypeId or missing skillId → no estimate.

_sources.math: mirrors fedorovvl/tso_client user_exp_time_matrix.js convention: real = base * skill_product * 100 / bonus
_sources.baseDurations: settlersonlinewiki.eu/en/guides/geologist/ — basic Geologist exploration times (timeBonus=100). Verify against learner divergence logs.
_sources.timeBonus: tsowiki.eu/specialists/geologists/ — wiki notation translated: '+100% speed' = bonus 200, '-67% time' ≈ bonus 300, '+33% speed' ≈ bonus 133. Resource-specific subtypes use byTask. Lovely(40)/Diligent(59)/Chummy(62) not yet pinned.

baseDurations._comment: Basic Geologist (timeBonus=100) exploration times in seconds. Source: settlersonlinewiki.eu/en/guides/geologist/. Actual time = base * skill_product * 100 / timeBonus.

_dropSkills._doc: Non-time skills from the science page. Recorded so future features (skill display, build optimizer) can reference them, and so we have something to match against when resolving IDs from idle logs.

manuscript.name: HiddenStoneStash
manuscript.effect: chance of treasure when searching stone

manuscript.name: NaturalCopperVein
manuscript.effect: chance to discover bigger copper deposits

manuscript.name: TwoMarbleInOne
manuscript.effect: chance to discover two marble deposits simultaneously

manuscript.name: QualityCopperMineshafts
manuscript.effect: chance to find copper deposits minable 50% faster

manuscript.name: NaturalStoneVein
manuscript.effect: chance to discover bigger stone deposits

tome.name: NaturalMarbleVein
tome.effect: chance to discover bigger marble deposits

tome.name: TwoIronInOne
tome.effect: chance to discover two iron deposits simultaneously

tome.name: QualityCoalMineshafts
tome.effect: chance to find coal deposits minable 50% faster

codex.name: HiddenCoalStash
codex.effect: chance of treasure when searching coal

codex.name: NaturalGoldVein
codex.effect: chance to discover bigger gold deposits

codex.name: TwoCoalInOne
codex.effect: chance to discover two coal deposits simultaneously

codex.name: QualityGoldMineshafts
codex.effect: chance to find gold deposits minable 50% faster

codex.name: LuckyFind
codex.effect: 15% chance to discover one more iron or marble deposit than maximum

codex.name: NaturalBornDigger
codex.effect: chance to discover ~8% bigger deposits of all types

codex.name: NaturesGift
codex.effect: 10% chance to refill a random deposit when geologist returns

_resolvedSkillIds._doc: Resolved AMF wire IDs for geologist skills, populated by cross-referencing [GeologistDuration] idle logs with the in-game skill book.
